new_cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal stability impact
new_cascade_issues.description: Reduced power generation may affect thermal control, increasing the risk of exceeding ΔT limits across orbital cycles.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural balance alteration
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel alters the structural balance, potentially affecting mechanical stability and vibration response.

new_missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM with reduced solar panel configuration.
new_missing_tests.reason: To verify thermal stability after removing the right solar panel.
